action_paradigm.description: How agents execute actions in environments
action_paradigm.boundary: Action execution paradigm. NOT agent_computer_interface (specific protocol) nor cli_tool (CLI wrapper).

action_prompt.boundary: Tarefa especifica. O LLM EXECUTA isso.
action_prompt.description: Prompt de tarefa que o humano/orquestrador envia ao agente

agent.boundary: Definicao completa de agente (persona + capabilities). NAO eh skill (P04, habilidade executavel) nem system_prompt (P03, como fala).

agent_card.boundary: Agent deployment spec. NAO eh agent (P02, persona only) nem boot_config (P02, provider startup) nem spawn_config (P12, runtime launch).
agent_card.description: Deployment spec for autonomous agent — identity, model, tools, boot, dispatch, constraints

agent_computer_interface.boundary: Agent-computer interface. NOT browser_tool (web automation) nor computer_use (screen control).

agent_package.boundary: Pacote distribuivel de agente em formato ISO. NAO eh agent (spec do agente) â€” agent_package eh o bundle portable.
agent_package.description: Pacote portable de agente AI (ISO format) â€” self-contained, LLM-agnostic

agent_profile.description: Agent persona and identity construction method
agent_profile.boundary: Agent persona construction. NOT agent (full agent def) nor system_prompt (how agent speaks).

agentic_rag.boundary: Agentic RAG pattern. NOT retriever (simple retrieval) nor agent (agent definition).

api_client.boundary: Cliente unidirecional tipado. NAO eh db_connector nem mcp_server.

audio_tool.boundary: Processa input/output de audio. NAO eh vision_tool (visual) nem notifier (delivery de mensagem).

axiom.boundary: Regra fundamental imutavel. NAO eh law (P08, operacional ajustavel) nem instruction (P03, flexivel).
axiom.description: Principio fundamental imutavel â€” parte da identidade profunda da entidade

batch_config.description: Async batch processing config for bulk API operations (OpenAI Batch, Anthropic Batches)
batch_config.boundary: API-level async batch job config. NOT a schedule (cron-based) nor a workflow (multi-step). This is a single bulk request.

benchmark.boundary: Medicao de performance quantitativa. NAO eh eval (nao testa corretude) nem scoring_rubric (nao define criterios).

benchmark_suite.description: Composite benchmark definition with multiple tasks
benchmark_suite.boundary: Benchmark suite. NOT benchmark (single benchmark) nor eval_framework (evaluation tooling).

bias_audit.boundary: Fairness evaluation. NOT benchmark (general perf) nor eval_metric (single metric def).

boot_config.boundary: Bootstrap por provider (claude, cursor, codex). NAO eh env_config (P09, variaveis genericas) nem spawn_config (P12, agent_groups).

browser_tool.boundary: Interage com paginas web via DOM. NAO eh computer_use (tela generica) nem search_tool (busca sem navegacao).
browser_tool.description: Automacao de browser: DOM parsing, navegacao, interacao, screenshot

bugloop.boundary: Ciclo automatico detect>fix>verify. NAO eh unit_eval (P07, teste manual) nem optimizer (melhoria continua, nao correcao).
bugloop.description: Ciclo de correcao automatica (detect > fix > verify)

chain.boundary: Sequencia de PROMPTS. NAO eh workflow (P12, agentes+tools).
chain.description: Sequencia de prompts encadeados (output A -> input B)

chunk_strategy.boundary: Metodo de split. NAO eh embedding_config.

citation.description: Structured source attribution with provenance, URL, date, and reliability metadata
citation.boundary: Source reference with provenance. NAO eh knowledge_card (conteudo em si), rag_source (pipeline config), nem glossary_entry (definicao de termo).

cli_tool.boundary: Ferramenta de linha de comando pontual. NAO eh skill (sem fases) nem daemon (nao persiste em background).

code_executor.boundary: Ambiente isolado que executa codigo. NAO eh cli_tool (comando shell pontual) nem daemon (processo persistente).
code_executor.description: Runtime sandboxed para execucao de codigo (Docker, E2B, Jupyter)

collaboration_pattern.boundary: Coordination pattern. NOT workflow (execution sequence) nor handoff_protocol (handoff rules).

compliance_framework.description: Regulatory mapping and attestation for AI systems
compliance_framework.boundary: Regulatory compliance mapping. NOT safety_policy (org rules) nor threat_model (risk assessment).

component_map.boundary: Mapa estruturado de componentes e conexoes. NAO eh diagram (visual) nem agent_card (escopo de 1 agent_group).
component_map.description: Mapa de componentes (what connects to what)

compression_config.description: Context compression configuration for tool outputs

computer_use.boundary: Interacao com interface grafica via automacao. NAO eh browser_tool (DOM) nem cli_tool (linha de comando).
computer_use.description: Controle de tela, teclado e mouse por LLM (Anthropic, browser-use)

consolidation_policy.boundary: Memory lifecycle policy. NOT memory_scope (access rules) nor compression_config (token compression).

content_filter.boundary: Content filtering pipeline. NOT guardrail (broad safety constraint) nor output_validator (schema check).

content_monetization.boundary: Pipeline completo de monetizacao de conteudo: billing, credits, checkout, courses, ads, emails. NAO eh pricing_strategy (estrategia apenas) nem payment_integration (provider apenas).

context_doc.boundary: Contexto de dominio para hidratar prompts. NAO eh knowledge_card (sem density gate) nem glossary_entry (nao define termo).

context_window_config.description: Token budget allocation, priority tiers, and overflow rules for prompt assembly
context_window_config.boundary: Budget allocation spec. NAO eh prompt_template (conteudo), system_prompt (identidade), nem model_card (capabilities).

cost_budget.description: Token budget allocation, spend tracking, cost alerts per provider/model/nucleus
cost_budget.boundary: Money and token economics. NOT a rate_limit_config (requests/sec) nor a token_budget tool (internal). This is the budget POLICY.

daemon.boundary: Processo background persistente. NAO eh hook (evento unico) nem cli_tool (execucao pontual e termina).

dag.boundary: Grafo aciclico de dependencias entre tasks. NAO eh workflow (execucao direta) nem component_map (P08, componentes).

dataset_card.boundary: Dataset documentation. NOT eval_dataset (eval-specific data) nor knowledge_card (general knowledge).

db_connector.boundary: Acesso a dados estruturados. NAO eh api_client nem retriever.
db_connector.description: Conector de banco/dados estruturados (SQL, GraphQL, REST-to-DB)

decision_record.boundary: Registro. NAO eh law nem pattern.

diagram.boundary: Diagrama visual de arquitetura. NAO eh component_map (dados estruturados) nem pattern (sem prescricao).

diff_strategy.boundary: Diff matching strategy. NOT edit_format (format spec) nor parser (generic parsing).

dispatch_rule.boundary: Regra de despacho keyword>agent_group. NAO eh router (P02, task>model routing) nem workflow (nao executa, apenas roteia).

document_loader.boundary: Transforma arquivo bruto em documentos chunkeados. NAO eh retriever (busca sobre chunks) nem search_tool (busca externa).
document_loader.description: Ingere arquivos e converte em chunks (PDF, HTML, CSV, etc)

dual_loop_architecture.boundary: Dual-loop control. NOT workflow (linear flow) nor collaboration_pattern (multi-agent topology).

e2e_eval.boundary: Teste end-to-end de pipeline completo. NAO eh unit_eval (escopo isolado) nem benchmark (nao mede performance).

edit_format.boundary: Edit format spec. NOT diff_strategy (matching algo) nor formatter (output formatting).

effort_profile.boundary: effort_profile = QUAL modelo/thinking usar; runtime_rule = QUANDO/COMO executar
effort_profile.description: Effort and thinking level configuration for builder execution

embedder_provider.description: Text embedding provider for vector search

embedding_config.boundary: Configuracao de modelo de embedding. NAO eh knowledge_index (P10) que configura o indice, apenas o modelo vetorial.

entity_memory.boundary: Fatos sobre X. NAO eh learning_record.

env_config.boundary: Variaveis de ambiente do sistema. NAO eh boot_config (P02, per-provider) nem feature_flag (on/off logico).

eval_framework.boundary: Eval framework. NOT benchmark_suite (benchmark collection) nor eval_metric (single metric).

eval_metric.boundary: Single metric def. NOT benchmark_suite (composite) nor scoring_rubric (qualitative rubric).

experiment_config.description: A/B test and prompt experiment configuration with variants, metrics, and statistical analysis
experiment_config.boundary: Experiment config with variants and metrics. NOT a feature_flag (boolean toggle) nor a benchmark (one-time evaluation).

experiment_tracker.boundary: Experiment tracking. NOT benchmark (evaluation suite) nor experiment_config (single experiment settings).

fallback_chain.boundary: Sequencia de fallback entre modelos LLM. NAO eh chain (P03, sequencia de prompts) nem router (task routing).
fallback_chain.description: Sequencia de fallback (model A > B > C)

feature_flag.boundary: Flag de feature on/off com rollout gradual. NAO eh permission (acesso) nem env_config (variavel generica).

few_shot_example.boundary: Par input/output para few-shot learning. NAO eh golden_test (P07) que avalia qualidade, apenas exemplifica formato.

finetune_config.description: Fine-tuning job configuration: dataset, base model, adapter type (LoRA/PEFT), hyperparameters, eval metrics
finetune_config.boundary: Training config. NOT a model_provider (runtime routing) nor a model_card (documentation). This defines HOW to train/adapt a model.

formatter.boundary: Transformador de formato de saida. NAO eh parser (nao extrai dados) nem response_format (nao define o que o LLM ve).

function_def.boundary: Schema JSON de funcao que LLM pode chamar via tool_use. NAO eh mcp_server (protocolo completo) nem api_client (implementacao do client).
function_def.description: Definicao de funcao callable por LLM (JSON Schema tool)

glossary_entry.boundary: Definicao curta de termo do dominio. NAO eh knowledge_card (sem densidade min) nem context_doc (sem escopo).

golden_test.boundary: Caso de teste referencia quality 9.5+. NAO eh few_shot_example (P01, exemplifica) nem unit_eval (qualquer quality).

graph_rag_config.boundary: Graph RAG config. NOT knowledge_graph (graph instance) nor rag_source (document source).

guardrail.boundary: Restricao de seguranca e safety boundary. NAO eh permission (P09, acesso) nem law (P08, operacional).

handoff.boundary: Instrucao de handoff com task+context+commit. NAO eh action_prompt (P03, prompt puro) nem signal (evento simples).

hitl_config.description: Human-in-the-loop approval flow configuration: review triggers, escalation chains, timeout actions
hitl_config.boundary: Requires HUMAN judgment. NOT a guardrail (automated block) nor a quality_gate (automated scoring). This pauses for human review.

hook.boundary: Codigo executavel em evento pre/post. NAO eh lifecycle_rule (P11, regra declarativa) nem daemon (processo persistente).

hook_config.boundary: hook_config = DECLARACAO de quais hooks; hook = IMPLEMENTACAO do hook
hook_config.description: Hook lifecycle configuration for builder execution

incident_report.boundary: Incident post-mortem. NOT bugloop (auto-fix) nor learning_record (generic learning).

input_schema.boundary: Contrato de entrada que define dados requeridos. NAO eh validation_schema (saida) nem type_def (definicao abstrata).

instruction.description: Step-by-step execution instructions for agents or pipelines

interface.boundary: Contrato bilateral de integracao entre agentes. NAO eh input_schema (unilateral) nem signal (P12, evento simples).

invariant.boundary: Lei operacional inviolavel do sistema. NAO eh instruction (P03, flexivel) nem guardrail (P11, safety-focused).

judge_config.description: LLM judge configuration for automated evaluation
judge_config.boundary: Judge config. NOT llm_judge (judge instance) nor scoring_rubric (human rubric).

knowledge_card.boundary: Conhecimento destilado, estatico, versionado. NAO eh instrucao, template, ou configuracao.

knowledge_graph.description: Graph-based knowledge schema with entity types, relation types, and traversal strategies for GraphRAG
knowledge_graph.boundary: Relational knowledge structure. NOT an entity_memory (single entity recall) nor a knowledge_index (flat search). This defines RELATIONSHIPS between entities.

knowledge_index.boundary: Indice de busca semantica (BM25, FAISS). NAO eh embedding_config (P01, modelo) nem rag_source (P01, fonte).

landing_page.description: Complete production-ready landing page with 12 sections, responsive, dark mode, SEO

learning_record.boundary: Registro de aprendizado persistente. NAO eh session_state (efemero) nem axiom (imutavel, nao aprende).
learning_record.description: Registro de aprendizado (o que deu certo/errado)

lens.boundary: Perspectiva especializada sobre dominio. NAO eh agent (sem capabilities) nem mental_model (sem routing rules).

lifecycle_rule.boundary: Regra declarativa de ciclo de vida. NAO eh hook (P04, codigo executavel) nem runtime_rule (P09, tecnico).
lifecycle_rule.description: Regra de ciclo de vida (freshness, archive, promote)

mcp_server.boundary: Servidor MCP que expoe tools e resources. NAO eh connector (integracao simples) nem client (consumidor de API).

memory_architecture.boundary: Memory system design. NOT memory_type (single type) nor memory_scope (access scope).

memory_benchmark.boundary: Memory eval suite. NOT benchmark_suite (general benchmarks) nor memory_architecture (system design).

memory_scope.boundary: Qual memoria usar. NAO eh session_state.

memory_type.boundary: Classification and policy for memory types. NAO eh entity_memory (instancia de memoria) nem memory_scope (quem acessa) nem memory_summary (resumo).
memory_type.description: Classification of persistent memory by source, confidence, and decay rate

mental_model.boundary: Identidade fixa do agente com routing e decisoes. NAO eh mental_model P10 (estado variavel por sessao).

model_architecture.boundary: Architecture definition. NOT model_card (deployment spec) nor model_provider (API integration).

model_card.boundary: Spec de LLM (pricing, context window, capabilities). NAO eh agent (P02, quem usa o modelo) nem boot_config (como inicia).
model_card.description: Spec do LLM usado (pricing, context, capabilities)

model_provider.description: LLM provider adapter (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Ollama, OpenRouter, LiteLLM)

model_registry.boundary: Model registry. NOT model_card (single model spec) nor checkpoint (training snapshot).

multi_modal_config.description: Input format, resolution, encoding, and routing rules for multi-modal LLM interactions
multi_modal_config.boundary: Modality config. NAO eh vision_tool (analise visual), audio_tool (processa audio), nem model_card (capabilities).

multimodal_prompt.boundary: Multimodal prompt. NOT prompt_technique (text-only) nor multi_modal_config (model settings).

naming_rule.boundary: Regra de nomenclatura de artefatos. NAO eh validator (P06, valida conteudo) nem type_def (P06, define tipo).

notifier.boundary: Envia notificacao para usuario/sistema. NAO eh webhook (evento bidirecional) nem api_client (integracao completa).
notifier.description: Entrega de notificacao push (email, SMS, Slack, Discord)

ontology.description: Formal taxonomy and ontology definitions (OWL, SKOS, schema.org patterns) for knowledge organization
ontology.boundary: Formal classification structure. NOT a knowledge_graph (entity relations) nor a glossary_entry (single term). This defines the CLASSIFICATION SYSTEM itself.

optimizer.boundary: Otimizador de processo metric>action. NAO eh bugloop (correcao pontual) nem benchmark (P07, medicao passiva).

output_validator.boundary: Valida OUTPUT. NAO eh validator P06.

parser.boundary: Extrator de dados de saida bruta. NAO eh formatter (nao transforma formato) nem validator (P06, nao valida).

path_config.boundary: Caminhos do sistema de arquivos. NAO eh env_config (variaveis genericas) nem permission (controle de acesso).

pattern.boundary: Pattern reutilizavel de arquitetura. NAO eh law (inviolavel) nem workflow (P12, sequencia executavel).

permission.boundary: Regra de permissao de acesso. NAO eh guardrail (P11, safety boundary) nem feature_flag (on/off de feature).

planning_strategy.boundary: Planning approach. NOT reasoning_strategy (prompt reasoning) nor workflow (execution flow).

plugin.boundary: Extensao plugavel ao sistema. NAO eh hook (evento especifico) nem skill (sem fases estruturadas).

procedural_memory.boundary: Procedural memory. NOT entity_memory (entity facts) nor knowledge_card (declarative knowledge).

prompt_cache.description: TTL, eviction, and invalidation config for cached LLM prompt/completion pairs
prompt_cache.boundary: Cache config. NAO eh session_state (contexto efemero), memory_summary (historico), nem runtime_state (variaveis runtime).

prompt_compiler.description: Intent-to-artifact transmutation rules. Compiles vague user input into structured {kind, pillar, nucleus, verb} resolution. The behavioral seed that makes any LLM operating CEX a prompt compiler (DSPy term).
prompt_compiler.boundary: Transmutation rules and mappings. NOT a router (routes between providers), NOT a dispatch_rule (routes tasks to agents), NOT a prompt_template (template with vars). This IS the layer that resolves WHAT the user wants before any routing happens.

prompt_optimizer.description: Automated prompt improvement and compilation tool
prompt_optimizer.boundary: Prompt optimizer. NOT prompt_compiler (CEX internal) nor optimizer (general optimization).

prompt_technique.boundary: Prompt technique. NOT prompt_template (reusable template) nor reasoning_strategy (reasoning-specific).

prompt_template.boundary: Template com variaveis. NAO eh user_prompt (fixo) nem system_prompt (identidade).
prompt_template.description: Molde reusavel com {{vars}} para gerar prompts

prosody_config.boundary: Prosody/emotion settings. NOT tts_provider (provider integration) nor agent_profile (agent persona).

quality_gate.boundary: Barreira de qualidade com score numerico. NAO eh validator (P06, tecnico pass/fail) nem scoring_rubric (P07, define criterios).

quantization_config.boundary: Quantization settings. NOT compression_config (context compression) nor model_architecture (full arch).

rag_source.boundary: Ponteiro para fonte externa indexavel. NAO eh o conteudo em si, apenas referencia com URL e freshness.

realtime_session.boundary: Realtime session config. NOT transport_config (network layer) nor voice_pipeline (full architecture).

reasoning_strategy.boundary: Reasoning technique. NOT prompt_technique (generic prompt pattern) nor thinking_config (budget settings).

reasoning_trace.description: Structured chain-of-thought reasoning with confidence scores

regression_check.boundary: Atual vs anterior. NAO eh benchmark.

repo_map.boundary: Repo context map. NOT component_map (system architecture) nor knowledge_index (search index).

reranker_config.description: Retrieval reranking model and strategy config
reranker_config.boundary: Reranker config. NOT retriever_config (first-stage retrieval) nor retriever (retrieval logic).

research_pipeline.boundary: Pipeline de pesquisa multi-fonte STORM+CRAG+CRITIC. NAO eh retriever (busca local) nem search_tool (busca web simples).

response_format.boundary: Formato de resposta injetado no prompt do LLM. NAO eh validation_schema P06 (contrato pos-geracao aplicado pelo sistema).
response_format.description: Formato de resposta do LLM (como o agente responde)

retriever.boundary: Busca sobre embedding store ou indice local. NAO eh search_tool (busca web externa) nem document_loader (ingere arquivos).
retriever.description: Busca vetorial/keyword/hibrida sobre store local (RAG core)

retriever_config.boundary: Parametros de busca. NAO eh embedding_config.

reward_model.boundary: Reward model config. NOT rl_algorithm (training algo) nor scoring_rubric (human eval rubric).

rl_algorithm.boundary: RL algorithm def. NOT training_method (broader training) nor reward_model (reward function).

router.boundary: Roteamento task-to-agent_group. NAO eh dispatch_rule (P12, keyword>agent_group) nem fallback_chain (modelo>modelo).

runtime_rule.boundary: Regra de runtime tecnica (timeouts, retries). NAO eh lifecycle_rule (P11, ciclo de vida) nem law (P08, inviolavel).

runtime_state.boundary: Estado mental variavel acumulado em runtime. NAO eh mental_model P02 (identidade fixa do agente, imutavel) nem session_state (efemero, snapshot).
runtime_state.description: Estado mental variavel por sessao (routing, decisoes em runtime)

safety_policy.boundary: Safety governance rules. NOT threat_model (risk assessment) nor compliance_framework (regulatory mapping).

sandbox_config.boundary: Sandbox/isolation config. NOT env_config (environment vars) nor code_executor (execution logic).

scoring_rubric.boundary: Criterio de avaliacao com framework. NAO eh benchmark (nao mede) nem quality_gate (P11, nao bloqueia).

search_strategy.boundary: Search/inference strategy. NOT reasoning_strategy (prompt technique) nor retriever (document retrieval).

search_tool.boundary: Busca e retorna resultados ranqueados. NAO eh retriever (vector store local) nem document_loader (ingere arquivos).
search_tool.description: Busca web, semantica ou hibrida (Tavily, Serper, Perplexity)

self_improvement_loop.boundary: Self-improvement loop. NOT bugloop (bug-specific) nor learning_record (passive learning).

session_state.boundary: Estado efemero de sessao (snapshot). NAO eh runtime_state (persistente entre sessoes) nem learning_record (nao acumula).

signal.boundary: Sinal simples entre agentes (complete, error). NAO eh handoff (instrucao completa) nem interface (P06, contrato).

skill.boundary: Phased reusable capability with trigger. NOT agent (P02, has identity) or workflow (P12, orchestration steps) or action_prompt (P03, single-turn).
skill.description: Reusable capability with trigger + phases (AgentSkills.io / Semantic Kernel pattern)

smoke_eval.boundary: Teste rapido de sanidade em <30s. NAO eh unit_eval (profundo) nem benchmark (metricas continuas).

social_publisher.boundary: Pipeline de auto-posting em redes sociais. NAO eh notifier (alertas pontuais) nem schedule (agendamento generico).

software_project.description: Complete software project definition — architecture, dependencies, build, deployment, repo structure
software_project.boundary: Projeto completo. NAO eh component_map (P08, visao parcial) nem agent_package (P02, pacote de agente).

spawn_config.boundary: Configuracao de spawn de agent_groups. NAO eh boot_config (P02, per-provider) nem env_config (P09, variaveis).

streaming_config.description: SSE, WebSocket, and chunked response streaming configuration for real-time LLM output
streaming_config.boundary: Transport-level streaming config. NOT a response_format (output structure) nor a rate_limit_config (throughput). This controls HOW output is delivered.

stt_provider.boundary: STT provider integration. NOT voice_pipeline (full arch) nor vad_config (detection settings).

supabase_data_layer.description: Supabase-specific data layer — tables, RLS policies, edge functions, storage buckets, auth rules
supabase_data_layer.boundary: Data layer Supabase. NAO eh db_connector (conexao generica) nem api_client (cliente REST).

supervisor.description: Crew orchestrator that composes and coordinates multiple builders

system_prompt.boundary: Identidade + regras + formato. Lido PRIMEIRO pelo LLM.
system_prompt.description: Prompt de sistema que define identidade e regras do agente

tagline.description: Short memorable phrase capturing brand essence — taglines, slogans, headlines

thinking_config.description: Extended thinking and budget token settings
thinking_config.boundary: Thinking budget config. NOT reasoning_strategy (technique) nor context_window_config (token limits).

threat_model.description: Structured hazard/risk assessment for AI systems
threat_model.boundary: Threat/risk assessment. NOT safety_policy (governance rules) nor guardrail (runtime filter).

toolkit.description: Collection of callable tools with auto JSON Schema

training_method.boundary: Training technique. NOT rl_algorithm (RL-specific) nor finetune_config (runtime fine-tune settings).

trajectory_eval.boundary: Trajectory evaluation. NOT benchmark (static eval) nor e2e_eval (end-to-end test).

transport_config.description: Network transport layer for realtime communication
transport_config.boundary: Transport layer config. NOT realtime_session (session lifecycle) nor streaming_config (LLM streaming).

tts_provider.boundary: TTS provider integration. NOT voice_pipeline (full arch) nor prosody_config (voice personality).

type_def.boundary: Definicao de tipo customizado no sistema. NAO eh input_schema (contrato de entrada) nem interface (contrato bilateral).

unit_eval.boundary: Teste unitario de agente ou prompt individual. NAO eh smoke_eval (rapido, sem profundidade) nem e2e_eval (pipeline completo).

vad_config.boundary: VAD settings only. NOT voice_pipeline (full arch) nor stt_provider (transcription).

validation_schema.boundary: Contrato formal aplicado pelo SISTEMA apos geracao. NAO eh response_format P05 (injetado no prompt, LLM ve).
validation_schema.description: Contrato de validacao pos-geracao (o sistema aplica, LLM nao ve)

validator.boundary: Regra de validacao tecnica pass/fail. NAO eh quality_gate (P11, score numerico) nem scoring_rubric (P07, criterios).

vector_store.description: Vector database backend for similarity search

vision_tool.boundary: Processa input visual e retorna dados estruturados. NAO eh browser_tool (interacao DOM) nem computer_use (controle de tela).
vision_tool.description: Analise de imagem, OCR, screenshot interpretation

visual_workflow.boundary: Visual workflow editor. NOT workflow (code-defined) nor dag (directed acyclic graph).

voice_pipeline.boundary: Voice pipeline architecture. NOT tts_provider (single provider) nor stt_provider (single provider).

webhook.boundary: Recebe ou envia eventos via HTTP. NAO eh api_client (request-response) nem notifier (delivery de mensagem).

workflow.boundary: Fluxo de agentes+tools sequenciais/paralelos. NAO eh chain (P03, sequencia de prompts) nem dag (grafo de deps sem execucao).

workflow_node.boundary: Workflow node type. NOT workflow (full workflow) nor visual_workflow (GUI editor config).

workflow_primitive.description: Workflow execution primitive (Step, Parallel, Loop, Condition, Router)
